title: Concert ticket seller asks for bank transfer first
content: Seller offers concert tickets at a discount, refuses protected payment, asks for bank transfer first, and moves the buyer to KakaoTalk open chat.
text_for_embedding: Concert ticket transfer scam. Seller asks for bank transfer first, refuses safe payment, requests KakaoTalk open chat, and promises to send ticket after payment.

title: Urgent baseball ticket transfer with no safe payment
content: Listing says today only, quick sale, bank deposit only. Seller says protected payment is not possible because the ticket must be transferred immediately.
text_for_embedding: Urgent sports ticket resale. Seller pressures buyer with today only, quick sale, and says safe payment is unavailable. Buyer is asked to deposit money first.

title: KakaoBank account transfer before shipment
content: Seller requests KakaoBank account transfer before shipping. The post avoids marketplace payment and asks the buyer to continue conversation in messenger.
text_for_embedding: Bank account transfer fraud pattern. Seller uses KakaoBank account, asks for deposit before shipment, avoids protected marketplace payment, and moves chat to messenger.

title: Fake safe payment link outside marketplace
content: Seller sends an external payment link that looks like safe payment but is not the official marketplace domain. Buyer is asked to pay quickly before the listing disappears.
text_for_embedding: Fake safe payment scam. Seller sends external payment link, pretends it is protected payment, uses off-platform chat, and pressures buyer to pay immediately.

title: Goods shipped only after deposit
content: Seller says direct transaction is impossible and asks for deposit first. They refuse escrow and say the item will be shipped after payment confirmation.
text_for_embedding: Deposit before shipping fraud. Seller refuses escrow or safe payment, requests account transfer first, and promises delivery only after payment confirmation.

title: Seller changes account number during chat
content: The seller first provides one bank account, then changes to another account and says the original account is blocked. They ask the buyer to send money immediately.
text_for_embedding: Suspicious account change. Seller changes bank account during chat, claims the first account is blocked, asks for immediate transfer, and uses off-platform messenger.

title: New seller with no reviews asks for transfer
content: The seller account is newly created with no transaction reviews. They reject protected payment and request bank transfer first for an expensive item.
text_for_embedding: New seller fraud risk. Newly created seller account has no reviews, rejects protected payment, asks for bank transfer first, and lists an expensive item.

title: Reservation deposit requested for ticket sale
content: Seller asks buyer to send a small reservation deposit first, then requests the remaining amount through bank transfer. Seller avoids official payment.
text_for_embedding: Reservation deposit scam. Ticket seller asks for small deposit first, later requests remaining bank transfer, avoids official payment, and uses KakaoTalk.

title: Gift card code sent after bank transfer
content: Seller says they will send a digital gift card code after receiving bank transfer. They refuse safe payment and say screenshots are enough proof.
text_for_embedding: Digital code transaction risk. Seller promises to send gift card code after bank transfer, refuses safe payment, and uses screenshot proof instead of protected transaction.

title: Lower risk local pickup with protected payment
content: Seller allows local pickup, accepts protected payment, and has several completed reviews. No urgent transfer or off-platform chat is requested.
text_for_embedding: Lower risk transaction. Seller accepts protected payment, allows local pickup, has completed reviews, and does not request off-platform payment.
